thesis.label: Our Thesis
thesis.title: The Digital Thread Is the New Competitive Moat
thesis.description: The Digital Thread — the continuous, connected flow of data from design through manufacturing, operations, and service — is transforming how products are conceived, built, and maintained. Companies that master this thread don't just optimize workflows; they build an unassailable moat around their competitive position.
thesis.threadDesc: 600+ startups weaving the digital thread — connecting CAD, simulation, manufacturing, and service data into a single, unbroken chain of product intelligence.
thesis.moatDesc: The investors and incumbents who identify which threads will hold — and which will snap — gain a durable edge that compounds with every product generation.
thesis.intelligenceDesc: We map the entire landscape — from bootstrap to Series C+ — so you can see where the thread is strongest, where it's fraying, and where the next $1B opportunity hides.
thesis.quote: In a world where every product generates a lifetime of data, the companies that own the thread own the future. ThreadMoat exists to map who's building that future — and who's investing in it.

expertise.title: Decades of Deep Domain Expertise
expertise.subtitle: With over 35 years immersed in the engineering software and Industrial AI markets, we bring unparalleled insight into technology trends, market dynamics, and the founders shaping the future of industrial innovation.
expertise.esDesc: PLM, CAD, CAE, simulation, digital twin, generative design, and next-generation design tools transforming product development.
expertise.aiDesc: Machine learning for manufacturing, predictive maintenance, computer vision for quality control, and AI-powered optimization.
expertise.miDesc: Comprehensive understanding of buyer personas, sales cycles, competitive dynamics, and go-to-market strategies in B2B industrial tech.
